h3ClassnameTextLgFont: Workflow not found
pClassnameTextMutedForeground: Failed to load workflow or it may have been removed.
buttonVariantOutlinePrefixiconArrowleft:
<Button variant='outline' prefixIcon={<ArrowLeft className='h-4 w-4' />} onClick={() => navigate(RouteNames.workflows)}>
						Back to Workflows
					</Button>
buttonVariantOutlineSizeSm:
<Button variant='outline' size='sm' prefixIcon={<ArrowLeft className='h-4 w-4' />} onClick={() => navigate(RouteNames.workflows)}>
					Back to Workflows
				</Button>
pClassnameTextSmFont: Failed to load event debug details
dtClassnameColSpan3: <dt className='col-span-3 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 flex items-start pt-0.5'>Qty</dt>
spanClassnameFontNormalFlex: Event Filter
pClassnameGettypographyclassBodyDefault: Not enough data is available in the selected range to show this statistics.
descriptionCreateANewApi: description='Create a new API key to access the Flexprice API
pThisApiKeyWill: This API key will have full access with all permissions inherited from your user account.
pTheBackendEndpointFor: The backend endpoint for service accounts is not yet implemented. Please create a user account API key instead, or contact your administrator.
pCreateAServiceAccount: Create a service account first to generate API keys for automated services.
buttonIsloadingIspendingDisabledIsformva:
<Button isLoading={isPending} disabled={!isFormValid || isRolesError} onClick={() => createServiceAccount()}>
					Create Service Account
				</Button>
descriptionCreateANewService: description='Create a new service account with specific roles for automated services
pServiceAccountsAreUsed: Service accounts are used for automated processes and API integrations. They have fixed roles and permissions.
pUnableToLoadAvailable: Unable to load available roles. Please contact your administrator.
